source: Pi session 2026-05-14 — KeyboardInterrupt during supabase/realtime/websockets cold import
title: Defer Supabase client creation and health check off the startup path
what_failed: Pi's startup blocked for 3-5 seconds on the supabase->realtime->websockets dataclass import chain before printing the banner. Ash hit Ctrl+C during that window thinking the agent was stuck.
where_failed: tools/tools_memory.py::__init__ called create_client() synchronously, AND pi_agent.py ran run_health_check() (which touches Supabase) synchronously before the banner.
why_likely: Cold imports on Windows + Python 3.13 are genuinely slow; nothing in the code path indicated startup was still progressing.
suggested_fix: 1. MemoryTools.supabase becomes a @property that lazy-creates the client on first access (with a lock). 2. run_health_check moves to a background thread when --verbose-init is not passed.
